scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.dev:auto: concurrently "PORT=8791 CLIENT_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:5191 OAUTH_REDIRECT_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:8791 npm run dev --workspace server" "VITE_SERVER_PORT=8791 VITE_AUTO_LOGIN=true npm run dev --workspace client -- --port 5191"
